Welcome to SM CORSE

Elite iRacing endurance team platform. Professional telemetry analysis, AI-powered coaching, and advanced race strategy tools to drive your performance to the next level.

Team Platform Features

Telemetry Analysis

Upload and analyze your iRacing telemetry files with professional-grade tools and insights.

AI Coaching

Get personalized coaching feedback powered by advanced AI to improve your driving technique.

Race Strategy

Calculate fuel usage, tire wear, and optimal pit strategies for endurance racing.

Team Management

Coordinate driver rotations, practice sessions, and team communications in one place.

Lap Library

Compare your laps against reference times from coaches and top drivers.

Progress Tracking

Monitor your improvement over time with detailed performance analytics and metrics.

Our Partners

SM CORSE Esports Racing Team
